title: callitriche intermedia subsp. hamulata
intro: Callitriche intermedia subsp. hamulata, also known as water starwort, is a perennial aquatic plant species belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Callitriche intermedia subsp. hamulata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support immune function, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. In traditional herbal medicine, Callitriche intermedia subsp. hamulata is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be used in salves and creams for topical application.
